title: @matei_zaharia: Really excited to open source a new project: Omnigent, a meta-harness for AI age...
rawContent:
Tweet by @matei_zaharia (Matei Zaharia)
Author bio: CTO @Databricks and prof @UCBerkeley. Working on data + AI, @ApacheSpark, @DeltaLakeOSS, @MLflow, @DSPyOSS, @GEPA_ai. https://t.co/nmRYAKG0LZ
Text: Really excited to open source a new project: Omnigent, a meta-harness for AI agents.

It lets you build multi-agent coding and custom agents, sitting above Claude Code, Codex, Pi, and agent SDKs to let you compose them. It also adds live collaboration and rich control policies. https://t.co/jwFmH8nHsZ
